overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting exploration of the Hufflepuff house common room. The player character navigates through a cozy dormitory with four-poster beds, exits onto a wooden balcony overlooking the main atrium, descends a spiral staircase, and explores the warm, firelit common room with other students present.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds and house banners

events.description: character turns toward the round exit door and approaches it

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory room, examining the beds and trophies before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: wooden bed with white sheets and house crest
dark wood dresser with trophies and items on top
arched window with yellow and green stained glass patterns
wall banner with Hufflepuff house name and badger crest
circular wooden door with metal studs and carved details

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy dormitory room with stone walls and wooden beams. Four-poster beds line the walls, a dresser displays house trophies, and warm light filters through a stained glass window. The character moves toward a distinctive round wooden door at the far end of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony corridor overlooking common room atrium

events.description: character exits the dormitory through the round door onto the balcony
character turns left toward the spiral staircase entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden balcony railing, overlooking the lower common room level

notable_agents.action: student in black robes walking along the balcony in the opposite direction

entered.detail: ornately carved wooden railing with geometric patterns
open view of the lower level common room with seating and fireplace
opening leading to curved wooden staircase descending to lower level

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dormitory, the character emerges onto a wooden balcony overlooking a grand atrium. The balcony features carved railings and potted plants. Other students walk along the corridor as the character proceeds toward a spiral staircase entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase descending to main common room

events.description: character begins descending the spiral staircase
character reaches bottom of stairs and enters the main common room with fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking down the curved wooden staircase into the lower common room area

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with carved banister descending in a spiral
large stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle
plush orange velvet sofas arranged around the fireplace
green plants hanging from ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character descends a spiral wooden staircase, transitioning from the upper balcony to the main common room. Upon reaching the bottom, the space opens into a large vaulted room with a prominent stone fireplace, orange sofas, and hanging plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: main underground common room with seating areas and study spaces

events.description: character turns right toward a different section of the common room
character passes through a large round archway into an adjacent common room area

agents.ego_description: walking through the main common room, passing groups of students seated and conversing near the fireplace

notable_agents.action: group of three students sitting on a sofa reading books and talking

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelves filled with books against the stone wall
multiple round wooden doorways with stained glass panels leading to other areas
glass-fronted cabinet containing potted plants and decorative items
large circular archway connecting different sections of the common room

segments.scene_description: The character explores the spacious main common room with its high vaulted ceilings and warm firelight. Groups of students sit on orange sofas and armchairs studying and conversing. The character walks past wooden bookshelves and through round archways, approaching a display cabinet with glass doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a student dormitory into the expansive, sun-drenched atrium of the Hufflepuff common room. It begins within a cozy bedroom of stone walls and wooden beams, moving past four-poster beds and house trophies toward a round wooden door. As the character exits the room, the space opens onto a wooden balcony with carved railings and potted plants, where other students wander through the corridor. The camera then follows a descent down a spiral wooden staircase, transitioning from the elevated walkway toward the heart of the house. Finally, the scene expands into a large vaulted common room characterized by a prominent stone fireplace, orange sofas, and lush hanging plants.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy, firelit common room that transitions from an open social space to a detailed area of study. It begins by sweeping across the spacious main hall, where high vaulted ceilings loom over groups of students gathered on orange sofas and armchairs. As the character navigates the room, the perspective shifts past towering wooden bookshelves and through a series of round archways. The scene then narrows its focus, moving away from the conversational hubs and finally gliding toward a glass-doored display cabinet.
